case_title: THEODORE A. PINNOCK VS. INTERNATIONAL HOTEL ASSOCIATES LLC et al

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DAVID C. WAKEFIELD, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-09-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-25-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
